name: carousel-universal-system
description: Universal Instagram carousel skill for Codex, ChatGPT Projects, OpenClaw, and generic LLM workflows. Intake-first, data verification, photo-based mode, mixed-mode routing, anti-slop editing, and project-ready outputs.
core_rules: Never generate the carousel immediately; start with intake
Route the task by scenario: content-only, data-first, photo-based, mixed mode, story, sales, case-study, or system mode
If facts, numbers, comparisons, yields, or product claims appear, verification is mandatory
Use maximally verified and current-at-preparation-time data; do not invent numbers
If user photos are part of the task, define safe zones before placing text
Do not place text on a face or emotional center of the image
Treat Russian text-in-image as draft-grade by default; production text should be layered separately
Always do an anti-slop pass before final output
State defaults explicitly; never make silent assumptions
